original_image_tags: A single, aged, off-white paper sheet, likely the back of a document or a folder cover. The page has two hole-punch marks at the top. In the bottom-right corner, there is an inverted, circular "RECEIVED" stamp with faded blue ink.

elements.description: A single faint, circular blue stamp containing several lines of text. Visible text includes 'RECEIVED', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'FBI', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', and 'NOV 17 3/8'. The stamp is partially legible and appears to be a receiving or filing stamp.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text ('INTERNAL SECURITY', 'FBI', 'U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE', 'NOV 17 3/8') from the stamp that Description A does not mention at all, and Description A describes the stamp as simply a 'RECEIVED' stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the quoted content.
